'''鈭歞h-zh-j''' ('''kadhazhaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stale|stale]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stale|stale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazhaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazhaj|thidhazhaj]] || [[word:jidhazhaj|jidhazhaj]] || [[word:shidhazhaj|shidhazhaj]] || [[word:kidhazhaj|kidhazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhazhaj|thuthudhazhaj]] || [[word:jujudhazhaj|jujudhazhaj]] || [[word:shushudhazhaj|shushudhazhaj]] || [[word:kukudhazhaj|kukudhazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhazhaj|thudhazhaj]] || [[word:judhazhaj|judhazhaj]] || [[word:shudhazhaj|shudhazhaj]] || [[word:kudhazhaj|kudhazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhazhaj|thudhazhaj]] || [[word:judhazhaj|judhazhaj]] || [[word:shudhazhaj|shudhazhaj]] || [[word:kudhazhaj|kudhazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhazhaj|thedhazhaj]] || [[word:jedhazhaj|jedhazhaj]] || [[word:shedhazhaj|shedhazhaj]] || [[word:kedhazhaj|kedhazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhazhaj|thothodhazhaj]] || [[word:jojodhazhaj|jojodhazhaj]] || [[word:shoshodhazhaj|shoshodhazhaj]] || [[word:kokodhazhaj|kokodhazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazhaj|thodhazhaj]] || [[word:jodhazhaj|jodhazhaj]] || [[word:shodhazhaj|shodhazhaj]] || [[word:kodhazhaj|kodhazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazhaj|thodhazhaj]] || [[word:jodhazhaj|jodhazhaj]] || [[word:shodhazhaj|shodhazhaj]] || [[word:kodhazhaj|kodhazhaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]] || [[word:dhazhaj|dhazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhazhaj|th忙dhazhaj]] || [[word:j忙dhazhaj|j忙dhazhaj]] || [[word:sh忙dhazhaj|sh忙dhazhaj]] || [[word:k忙dhazhaj|k忙dhazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhazhaj|thathadhazhaj]] || [[word:jajadhazhaj|jajadhazhaj]] || [[word:shashadhazhaj|shashadhazhaj]] || [[word:kakadhazhaj|kakadhazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhazhaj|thadhazhaj]] || [[word:jadhazhaj|jadhazhaj]] || [[word:shadhazhaj|shadhazhaj]] || [[word:kadhazhaj|kadhazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhazhaj|thadhazhaj]] || [[word:jadhazhaj|jadhazhaj]] || [[word:shadhazhaj|shadhazhaj]] || [[word:kadhazhaj|kadhazhaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhazhaj|shadhazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhazhaj|goshadhazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhazhaj|gokishadhazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhajn眉|shadhazhajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkn眉|goshadhazhajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajn眉|gokishadhazhajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhazhajsh毛|shadhazhajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnksh毛|goshadhazhajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajsh毛|gokishadhazhajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhajro|shadhazhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkro|goshadhazhajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajro|gokishadhazhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhajmu|shadhazhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkmu|goshadhazhajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajmu|gokishadhazhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhazhajsher|shadhazhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnksher|goshadhazhajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajsher|gokishadhazhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhazhajng|shadhazhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkng|goshadhazhajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajng|gokishadhazhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhazhajya|shadhazhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkya|goshadhazhajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajya|gokishadhazhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhazhajyam|shadhazhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkyam|goshadhazhajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajyam|gokishadhazhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhajn眉sh毛|shadhazhajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkn眉sh毛|goshadhazhajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajn眉sh毛|gokishadhazhajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhajn眉ro|shadhazhajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkn眉ro|goshadhazhajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajn眉ro|gokishadhazhajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhajn眉mu|shadhazhajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkn眉mu|goshadhazhajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajn眉mu|gokishadhazhajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhajsh毛n眉|shadhazhajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnksh毛n眉|goshadhazhajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajsh毛n眉|gokishadhazhajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhajsh毛ro|shadhazhajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnksh毛ro|goshadhazhajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajsh毛ro|gokishadhazhajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhajsh毛mu|shadhazhajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnksh毛mu|goshadhazhajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajsh毛mu|gokishadhazhajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhajron眉|shadhazhajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkron眉|goshadhazhajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajron眉|gokishadhazhajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhajrosh毛|shadhazhajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkrosh毛|goshadhazhajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajrosh毛|gokishadhazhajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhajromu|shadhazhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkromu|goshadhazhajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajromu|gokishadhazhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhajmun眉|shadhazhajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkmun眉|goshadhazhajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajmun眉|gokishadhazhajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhajmush毛|shadhazhajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkmush毛|goshadhazhajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajmush毛|gokishadhazhajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhajmuro|shadhazhajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhajnkmuro|goshadhazhajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhajmuro|gokishadhazhajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
